programs.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programs.desc: A professional chef and his wife are trading snowy Boston for sunny Florida; but when the kitchen of his dreams is far from a reality, Brian and Mika are left trying to cook up a plan to keep things from boiling over.

programs.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programs.desc: Newlyweds trade in their double-wide for a dream home fit for their family; juggling wedding plans and bold design ideas isn't easy, so Brian and Mika look to help them build a forever home and find wedded bliss along the way!

programs.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses

programs.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programs.desc: A fireman and a nurse, who are a father-daughter duo, search for a coastal home in St. Augustine, Fla; they seek a property for sunsets and barbecues while balancing their different styles.

programs.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programs.desc: Lovebirds share a dream of joining their families on a slice of coastal paradise in Norfolk, Virginia; they're ready to wade through bayside views to find a beach house bargain, but his dock-side dad jokes may clash with their straight-laced agent.

programs.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
